top_signals.title: Gold Rebounds as Traders Assess Iran Strikes, Interest-Rate Path
top_signals.summary: Gold found some support following three days of losses as traders weighed a resumption of fighting in the Middle East and the US Federal Reserve’s interest-rate path.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix Said to Guide US Offering Price 3.1% Above Korea Close
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc. is telling investors it intends to price its US listing at $149 per American depositary receipt, according to people familiar with the matter, despite recent volatility in the Korean memory chipmaker’s shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Corporate report: The Value of Resilience: Cyber Resilience in Financial Services
top_signals.summary: Evidence on how cyber resilience can reduce disruption costs, support growth and strengthen financial performance in UK financial services.

top_signals.title: US Army tests autonomous mass minelaying
top_signals.summary: The Army’s Volcano mine dispenser can blanket 32 acres of terrain with up to 960 mines. Now, the Army is testing an autonomous version.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Carpet Firm Victoria Inks Deal With Excluded Creditors
top_signals.summary: UK carpet maker Victoria Plc and a group of bondholders left behind in an earlier debt deal have struck an agreement over a balance sheet restructuring.

top_signals.title: EU takes member states to court over unimplemented cybersecurity law
top_signals.summary: Ireland, Spain, France and the Netherlands are more than 20 months late in transposing the NIS2 Directive for the cybersecurity of critical infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
